conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with G, C, and F because we moved beyond general pleasantries to explicitly agree on watching each other's backs and potentially forming an alliance. My conversation with I also felt significant as we shared specific details about our families' struggles, which solidified a sense of shared purpose. I felt the least connected to J, whose cautious approach made it harder to establish a firm sense of mutual reliance compared to the others.

I established clear agreements with G to compare notes on others and with F and C to actively look out for one another during the game. I currently trust G and C the most due to our proactive discussion about cooperation, though I am keeping my guard up with everyone until I see how they handle the actual pressure of the prize pool.
